events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. The straightedge check across the sheave faces shows a visible gap consistent with misalignment beyond the typical mfr tolerance (~1/16 in per foot of center distance or ~0.5° angular), so the drive fails inspection at this rough-complete stage — needs realignment, re-torque, and re-check before sign-off.
